trails.name: Buckland Peaks Track
trails.description: Walk through forest and subalpine scrub to Buckland Peaks for stunning views of the Paparoa Range.

trails.name: Tiropahi Track
trails.description: Follow a historic tramway through Tiropahi gorge to an open pakihi.

trails.name: Charming Creek Walkway   Mid Pt Closed
Omau Carpark to Seal Colony Track
Cape Foulwind Walkway
trails.description: A seal colony, a lighthouse and panoramic views of mountains and coastline feature on this spectacular coastal walkway. With the beach close by as well it's a good option for children. It's also one of our best short walks.

trails.name: Charming Creek North Walkway
trails.description: Walk along the upper part of an historic bush tramway to historic mining sites, milling sites, and to a view of the Mangatini Falls.

trails.name: Denniston walking tracks
trails.description: Take a historic walk on the same tracks that residents and miners used over a hundred years ago in the coal mining township, and explore the many relics still present.

trails.name: Bridle Track
trails.description: This track, also known as the Denniston bridle path, completed in 1884, makes a pleasant if steep bush walk.

trails.name: Constant Bay Loop
trails.description: This loop track gives a great view of the rugged West Coast.

trails.name: Cape Foulwind Walkway
trails.description: A seal colony, a lighthouse and panoramic views of mountains and coastline feature on this spectacular coastal walkway. With the beach close by as well it's a good option for children. It's also one of our best short walks.
